message:
refactor(mail): extract shared normalizeAddress from AddressToIdentity and identityToAddress

Both functions had duplicate logic for handling overseer, mayor/deacon
trailing slashes, and crew/polecats path normalization. Extract into a
single normalizeAddress helper. AddressToIdentity trims trailing slashes
before delegating; identityToAddress delegates directly.

Closes: gt-hpotx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
